# Questions in Livestream 201

Live Stream #201: Back From The Land Of The Dead

Time links open the YouTube video at the relevant timestamp.

| Time | Question | Short answer / answer direction |
|---:|---|---|
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=565" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">9:25</a> | Why did you skip the so-called helicopter hieroglyphs on the Egypt trip? | He said they are not alien proof and belong to an overwritten inscription problem rather than mysterious ancient aircraft. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=936" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">15:36</a> | What kind of bridges did Egyptians have over the Nile and places like the Pi-Hahiroth area? | He said the exact bridge forms are uncertain because none survive, but texts and maps indicate that bridges did exist. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=1106" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">18:26</a> | What methods improve prose and storytelling quality? | He recommended a threefold approach built around reading widely, practicing deliberately, and learning technique from strong writing. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=1424" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">23:44</a> | What arms and armor would the Israelites have used when coming out of Egypt? | He said essentially none at the moment of departure; they would have acquired weapons later. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=1959" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">32:39</a> | Do biblical covenant structures correlate more with Egyptian or Assyrian covenants? | He said it depends on which covenant and date are in view, with Pentateuchal material showing stronger Egyptian and Hittite parallels and later material more Assyrian relevance. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=2063" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">34:23</a> | What is going on with the young man in Mark 14:51-52? | He said the man's identity is uncertain, but the scene most clearly fits the wider theme of disciples abandoning Jesus. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=2260" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">37:40</a> | Are there sacrifices in the Messianic Kingdom according to Ezekiel, and why? | He said sacrifices do appear in Ezekiel's vision, and they need not all be sin offerings because sacrifices can also express praise, thanksgiving, and ritual worship. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=3848" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">1:04:08</a> | What is going on in Mark 9:49-50? | He explained the saying in terms of preserving covenant seriousness and the testing, preserving role of salt imagery. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=4830" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">1:20:30</a> | Is there evidence for advanced Late Hittite cavalry doctrine, and how did it compare with Egypt's military? | He said the Hittites had sophisticated military traditions, though chariots remained central, and that Egypt and the Hittites were peer powers. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=5942" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">1:39:02</a> | Do you agree that Acts was written before Paul's death? | He was cautious, saying he had not studied the issue deeply but thought a pre-death date was possible. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/JZy3BGzlUxo?t=6004" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">1:40:04</a> | Why do Hebrew words for God and man sometimes take the definite article after Genesis 4? | He said the article can shift the sense between a name-like use and a qualitative or generic use, with context determining how much weight to place on it. |
